steps.title: Follow the research result
steps.content: Recent research shows tulip mania was not as frenzied or disastrous as people have thought. The next sentence says the popular myth should be regarded skeptically.

steps.title: Signal the conclusion
steps.content: Choice A introduces an example, Choice B signals contrast, and Choice C signals something true despite an obstacle. The skepticism follows from the research finding, so the transition must show result. The answer is D.
